h6e9b0107ge8fag4e46gaf41gdfc78ba13e59: This party is a bit more bearable, thanks to that pint.
hd8c7f2bege72ag419cgb8dag656e4c3c4d8c: I won't be nursing their pounding heads and sick stomachs in the morning.
h1f807917g69b7g4397gbde8g65144964aca7: Your friend already forced a pint on me, thanks.
h500475d1g849dg45c2g85e0g7bf3c649300d: Look at them all, guzzling poison like we've the right to be happy.
he7d5c004ga9e3g4bf7g8557g7a5d302b7a07: We survived. That's always worth celebrating.
hda32edbagb73fg43f7gb313ga34a4606e048: Not everyone. We lost people, and it's like they don't even care.
h044f93dbgd23fg4b1dg8440g23eb5e759707: But I care. And I won't drink myself into a stupor to change that.
h207ffb18g5f9dg4a64ga0bbg3a506801beb5: Are you this unpleasant by nature or choice?
h7e81cf74gbdfag423fgac89g166f3002ea1b: I'm the only one showing proper, sober respect.
h9df45d37g355dg4d8egafc5g2dba09ea800f: You're right. This should be a somber occasion.
he23db17cg3068g4918ga8d4gaeee92a04749: At least someone agrees with me.
h2df5f4f8gad10g44f2gb648g5f2b0bb219d7: Our dead deserve a sober tribute. Not this... display.
habc9a802g050eg4bc6g86dfg4f7868fae21e: You should join them - have a pint or two.
h18a9a3c8gcec6g4971ga7b8g594b58281550: Hm. Perhaps it'll make the evening more tolerable.
hfa645c65g4462g4765g8e5ag2953bef7abe6: I'm perfectly fine without that poison, thanks.
